commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the real-behavior-proof policy to treat the existing `maintainer` label as a privileged author signal and adds a focused regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. A direct current-main Node probe of `evaluateRealBehaviorProof` with `author_association: CONTRIBUTOR` plus the `maintainer` label returns `missing`, which matches the reported private-membership failure mode.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; the patch is focused and only awaits normal maintainer review and check confirmation.

target.title: ci(proof): trust maintainer label for private org members
target.body:
## Summary

Private org memberships report `author_association=CONTRIBUTOR`, so the real-behavior-proof gate currently demands proof from private maintainers. The labeler workflow already applies the `maintainer` label via the team-membership API (which sees private members), so trust it as an equivalent privileged signal in `evaluateRealBehaviorProof`.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/real-behavior-proof-policy.test.ts` -> 12 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/barnacle-auto-response.test.ts` -> 32 passed
target.author: romneyda
